description: Use this body in Postman for incoming chat (custom ring + full screen). ALL data values must be strings.
notes: Do NOT send only notification{title,body} — killed app will NOT open custom screen.
For auto full-screen without tap: use data-only (no top-level notification).
Optional display banner + data together (tap opens screen; auto may need data-only on OnePlus):
Add notification + android.notification.channel_id sound_channel AFTER data block.
